title: Administering agency
doc_html:
PART II. ADMINISTRATION

§5061. Administering agency

            The provisions of this Chapter shall be administered by the Board of Regents. The administering agency shall provide by rule adopted as provided by the Administrative Procedure Act for all matters necessary to the implementation of this Chapter.

            Acts 2015, No. 227, §1; Acts 2017, No. 97, §1; Acts 2018, No. 671, §1, eff. June 1, 2018.
doc_text:
PART II.  ADMINISTRATION
§5061.  Administering agency
The provisions of this Chapter shall be administered by the Board of Regents. The
administering agency shall provide by rule adopted as provided by the Administrative
Procedure Act for all matters necessary to the implementation of this Chapter.
Acts 2015, No. 227, §1; Acts 2017, No. 97, §1; Acts 2018, No. 671, §1, eff. June 1,
2018.
